strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures
Proven ability to design and operate scalable, real-time systems (e.g., Dunnhumby media, GISCollective)
Hands-on experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: Limited direct fintech or credit-risk system experience in resume
No explicit mention of regulatory/compliance infrastructure design in past roles
Short tenure in current role (started April 2025) may raise questions about stability
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with experience in event-driven architectures and real-time systems, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure. However, his resume lacks direct fintech or credit-risk system experience and explicit evidence of regulatory/compliance infrastructure design, which are critical for this role. His current role is still early-stage, limiting visibility into long-term impact.
